hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.rs$' || exit 0; rustfmt "$f"; d="$(dirname "$f")"; while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do [ -f "$d/Cargo.toml" ] && { cargo clippy --quiet --all-targets --manifest-path "$d/Cargo.toml" -- -D warnings 2>&1 || exit $?; break; }; d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; }
